versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   velero-11-1-0                   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: mirantis-velero
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: velero-11-1-0
      name: velero
      namespace: velero
      values: |
        velero:
          backupsEnabled: true
          snapshotsEnabled: true
          deployNodeAgent: true
          nodeAgent:
            # podVolumePath: /var/lib/kubelet/pods # config for kind cluster used in CI
            podVolumePath: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet/pods # for k0s
          initContainers:
            - name: velero-plugin-for-aws
              image: velero/velero-plugin-for-aws:latest
              imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
              volumeMounts:
                - mountPath: /target
                  name: plugins
          configuration:
            uploaderType: kopia
            backupStorageLocation:
              - name: velero-backup-storage-location
                provider: aws
                bucket: velero-backups-xx
                default: true
                config:
                  region: us-east-2
            volumeSnapshotLocation:
              - name: velero-volume-storage-location
                provider: aws
                config:
                  region: us-east-2
          credentials:
            useSecret: true
            secretContents:
              cloud: |
                [default]
                aws_access_key_id = xx
                aws_secret_access_key = xx

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: mirantis-velero
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: velero-8-1-0
      name: velero
      namespace: velero
      values: |
        velero:
          backupsEnabled: true
          snapshotsEnabled: true
          deployNodeAgent: true
          nodeAgent:
            # podVolumePath: /var/lib/kubelet/pods # config for kind cluster used in CI
            podVolumePath: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet/pods # for k0s
          initContainers:
            - name: velero-plugin-for-aws
              image: velero/velero-plugin-for-aws:latest
              imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
              volumeMounts:
                - mountPath: /target
                  name: plugins
          configuration:
            uploaderType: kopia
            backupStorageLocation:
              - name: velero-backup-storage-location
                provider: aws
                bucket: velero-backups-xx
                default: true
                config:
                  region: us-east-2
            volumeSnapshotLocation:
              - name: velero-volume-storage-location
                provider: aws
                config:
                  region: us-east-2
          credentials:
            useSecret: true
            secretContents:

                aws_access_key_id = xx
